Name: Average time for Completed + Cancelled
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Completed + Cancelled and the end of the case

Name: Total time for Completed + Cancelled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Completed + Cancelled and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time for Completed + Cancelled
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Completed + Cancelled and the end of the case

Name: Time of Completed + Cancelled
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Completed + Cancelled and the end of the case

Name: Completed + Cancelled Cycle Time
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Completed + Cancelled and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Completed + Cancelled to Completed + Closed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Cancelled' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Average time between Completed + Cancelled and Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Total time from Completed + Cancelled to Completed + Resolved
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Completed + Cancelled' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Minimum time between Completed + Cancelled and Queued + Awaiting Assignment
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Time from Completed + Cancelled to Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Cancelled' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time it takes Completed + Cancelled after the execution of Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Total time it takes Completed + Cancelled after the execution of Accepted + Assigned
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Minimum time it takes Completed + Cancelled after the execution of Accepted + Wait - Vendor
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Time of Completed + Cancelled in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Cancelled' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Completed + Cancelled Cycle Time in cases where Completed + In Call occurs earlier in the trace
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Cancelled' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Average duration of Completed + Cancelled compared to Completed + In Call within the same variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Total time for Completed + Cancelled in variants that transition directly from Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Minimum time for Completed + Cancelled following Accepted + Wait - Implementation
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Time from Accepted + In Progress to Completed + Cancelled in traces that do not contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Completed + Cancelled Cycle Time grouped by impact level (High, Medium, Low)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Cancelled' and the end of case grouped by the last value of impact
